title: nephroia bantamensis
intro: Nephroia bantamensis, also known as Bantam Orchid Tree, is a plant species in the Fabaceae family. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating urinary issues and kidney stones due to its diuretic and antispasmodic properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to alleviate symptoms of cystitis, reduce inflammation, and promote the removal of toxins from the body. Traditionally, Nephroia bantamensis is prepared into herbal tea, infusion, or decoction for its medicinal purposes, although modern research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
